title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at H.B. Fuller India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at H.B. Fuller India
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!
